title: Better Pale Garden
body:
# **Improvements to the Pale Garden!**
This Mod Pack improves and adds new Stuff to the Pale Garden, including:
## Glowing eyeblossom
![Eye Blossom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc111f78d7059d1c86cd2ac4c9fe7e365a4f8989.png)
The Eyeblossom glows!
## Biome fog
![Biome Fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fcc3b9b6330ea9ef18effde3d789cb81c72465b_0.webp)
The Pale Garden has fog!
## Pale pumpkins
![Pale Pumpkins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/564e278b5c34f1804aadf7d619ba8a56a53442f9.png)
Pale Pumpkins are here!
## Pale flower, tall and small bushes, pumpkins
![Pale flower, tall and small bushes, pumpkins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e05fad6e222d36c8d22ca82f9982ff769c91796.png)
I don't know if i can describe this...
## Ambient particles that look like creaking eyes
![Ambient particles that look like creaking eyes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a4da062d89632c664d5d2bc1f16f51835f801d4_0.webp)
Particles (similar to fireflies) but they look like the Creaking!
## Thorn bushes
![Thorn bushes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b708ecfec783c8b6ceacc8016dfa6813f84eeae_0.webp)
Basically Brown Bushes!
## Waxed creaking heart
![Waxed creaking heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9000c8c4db1bf926f24dcd7538752038dab708c.png)
Like the Creaking Heart but black!
## Cracked and mossy resin bricks
![Cracked and mossy resin bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78982cf81e7ab61ddfd325c6c8f3ce9335967d7f.png)
Resin Bricks can now be crafted Cracked or Mossy!
## Creaked armor trim smithing template
![Creaked armor trim smithing template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75c35ddc8d870ebb88e1e04c2e72a5fdc8e0c701.png)
Not all Armor is supported for the Creaked Trim as of my testing!
## Removed mob spawning
There's not really a way to show this as an Image!
